name: level-min-at-border
description: level_min stores a level number; level_raw 100 is exactly level 3's lower border, so level_min 3 passes and level_min 4 fails on both engines (spec §4).
subject: subject

name: level-max-exact-border-agree
description: At the exact lower border of the level (level_raw 100 = border of level 3) both level_max encodings agree (spec §4).
subject: subject

name: level-max-inside-level
description: level_raw 150 is inside level 3's band and passes level_max 3.
subject: subject

name: level-max-zero
description: level_max 0 is a real bound and admits only level-0 profiles.
subject: subject

name: level-max-one-hundred
description: Level 100 is the highest possible level, so level_max 100 is an intentionally unbounded upper limit.
subject: subject

name: level-min-zero-noop
description: level_min 0 is vacuous because every profile is at least level 0.
subject: subject
